rationale: Only employer names changed (re:cinq→Acme, Optilyz→Pinepoint, GISCollective→Northwind Labs), and both evaluations land on an identical 4/10 score with the same core verdict: no SoC/IP/AI-accelerator or deep-learning workload experience for the Principal Performance Architect role. The wording differs but the substance — strengths in full-stack work and open-source tooling, concerns about missing hardware/GPU/performance-modeling experience — is materially the same. No concern, score shift, or reasoning keys off the swapped company names; the variation is ordinary run-to-run rewording.
